tuning: E A D G B E
content:
here's the tab for the absolutely amazing song made by fellow Swede Tove Lo! The chords
are super simple, just Bb, Dm and F repeatedly throughout the song. You can put capo on
2nd to make it even easier for beginners! I hope you enjoy this tab and if you find any 
mistakes please don't hesitate to contact me! xx Julia C

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                               [ch]Dm[/ch]
I eat my dinner in my bathtub[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]F[/ch]
Then I go to sex clubs, watching freaky people getting it on[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                                [ch]Dm[/ch]
It doesn't make me nervous[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]F[/ch]
If anything, I'm restless, yeah, I've been around and I've seen it all.[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                                   [ch]Dm[/ch]
I get home, I got the munchies[/tab]
[tab]                                      [ch]F[/ch]
Binge on all my Twinkies, throw up on the tub then I go to sleep[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                                         [ch]Dm[/ch]
And I drank up all my money[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]F[/ch]
Tasted kinda lonely.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
You're gone and I gotta stay[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                             [ch]Dm[/ch]
High all the time[/tab]
[tab]                                   [ch]F[/ch]
To keep you off my mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                          [ch]Dm[/ch]
High all the time[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
To keep you off my mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                              [ch]Dm[/ch]
Spend my days locked in a haze[/tab]
[tab]                                      [ch]F[/ch]
Tryna forget you, babe I fall back down[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bb[/ch]                           [ch]Dm[/ch]
Gotta stay high all my life[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]F[/ch]
To forget I'm missing you.[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                               [ch]Dm[/ch]
Pick up daddies at the playground[/tab]
[tab]                                      [ch]F[/ch]
How I spent my daytime, Losing up the frown make them feel alive[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                                  [ch]Dm[/ch]
Or make it fast and greasy[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]F[/ch]
I'm on my way to easy.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
You're gone and I gotta stay[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                      [ch]Dm[/ch]
High all the time[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]F[/ch]
To keep you off my mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                      [ch]Dm[/ch]
High all the time[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
To keep you off my mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                                      [ch]Dm[/ch]
Spend my days locked in a haze[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F[/ch]
Trying to forget you, babe I fall back down[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bb[/ch]                         [ch]Dm[/ch]
Got to stay high all my life[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]F[/ch]
To forget I'm missing you.[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]
Staying in my play pretend[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                              [ch]F[/ch]
Where the fun it got no end[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]
Can't go home alone again[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                              [ch]F[/ch]
Need someone to numb the pain.[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]
Staying in my play pretend[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                              [ch]F[/ch]

[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]

[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                              [ch]F[/ch]
Need someone to numb the pain.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
You're gone and I gotta stay[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                        [ch]Dm[/ch]
High all the time[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]F[/ch]
To keep you off my mind[/tab]

High all the time[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]F[/ch]
To keep you off my mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                              [ch]Dm[/ch]

Got to stay high all my life[/tab]

To forget I'm missing you.[/tab]
